missing_articles.title: The Female Relief Society of Nauvoo

notes: Most files are correctly extracted. The main issues are: 1) The Mothers in Israel article is missing its proper beginning with the image caption, 2) The Editorial file has incomplete header information, and 3) The Female Relief Society of Nauvoo article (page 121) appears to be completely missing from the extracted files. The OCR contains this content but it was not extracted into any file.
